hero.subtitle: From design to launch, with total transparency on costs and services. Fast, secure, and compliant websites.

fast.title: Fast
fast.desc: Websites optimized for lightning-fast loading times

secure.title: Secure
secure.desc: HTTPS, anti-spam protection, and GDPR compliance

responsive.title: Responsive
responsive.desc: Perfect on every device, desktop and mobile

pricingPreview.subtitle: Pricing designed to offer flexibility, whether you are looking for a one-time investment or a managed monthly fee.
pricingPreview.note: For complex projects, quotes are calculated ad hoc based on the client's specific requests to ensure maximum fairness.

item1.title: Initial Consultation
item1.desc: Analysis of needs and project feasibility.

item2.title: Showcase Website
item2.desc: Standard solution with predefined structure. The price refers to an essential showcase website without advanced technical customizations.

item3.title: Maintenance
item3.desc: To keep the website always updated, secure and functional over time. Includes minor technical interventions, updates and hosting.

item4.title: Complete E-commerce
item4.desc: Consultation + ad hoc quote calculated based on specific requests.

item5.title: Custom Website
item5.desc: Tailor-made project, built from A to Z based on your needs. The cost is defined through consultation and personalized quote.

item6.title: Domain & Email
item6.desc: Name of the commercial business or brand, registration cost.

item7.title: Premium Maintenance
item7.desc: Everything included in the standard plan, plus a detailed bimonthly report on site performance, visits and bounce rate.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.desc: The initial consultation is completely free. We analyze your needs together.

privacyPolicy.s1Text: The Data Controller is Tommaso Roat — RTD, with registered office in Merano (BZ), Italy.
privacyPolicy.s2Intro: Personal data collected through the website may include:

s2Items.label: Contact data:
s2Items.text: name, surname, email address, phone number

s2Items.label: Browsing data:
s2Items.text: IP address, browser type, pages visited, access times

s2Items.label: Voluntarily provided data:
s2Items.text: information entered in the contact form

privacyPolicy.s3Intro: Personal data is processed for the following purposes:

s3Items.label: Legal obligations:
s3Items.text: fulfilling obligations required by applicable law

s3Items.label: Service improvement:
s3Items.text: anonymous statistical analysis of site usage (with consent)

privacyPolicy.s4Intro: Data processing is based on the following legal bases under Art. 6 of the GDPR:

s4Items.label: Consent:
s4Items.text: the data subject has given consent for specific purposes (Art. 6, par. 1, let. a)

s4Items.label: Contractual performance:
s4Items.text: processing is necessary for the performance of a contract (Art. 6, par. 1, let. b)

s4Items.label: Legal obligation:
s4Items.text: processing is necessary to comply with a legal obligation (Art. 6, par. 1, let. c)

s4Items.label: Legitimate interest:
s4Items.text: processing is necessary to pursue a legitimate interest of the controller (Art. 6, par. 1, let. f)

privacyPolicy.s5Text1: Personal data will be retained for the time strictly necessary to achieve the purposes for which it was collected and in any case not beyond the limits set by applicable law.
privacyPolicy.s5Text2: In particular: data related to contact requests will be retained for a maximum of 24 months from collection.
privacyPolicy.s6Intro: Under Articles 15-22 of the GDPR, the data subject has the right to:
s6Items: Obtain rectification or deletion of data
Lodge a complaint with the Data Protection Authority
privacyPolicy.s6Contact: To exercise your rights, contact the Data Controller at:
privacyPolicy.s7Text: The Data Controller adopts appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure the security of personal data, including HTTPS/SSL protocols, data validation, rate limiting, and anti-spam protection.
privacyPolicy.s8Text: Personal data is not transferred outside the European Economic Area (EEA). If necessary, the transfer will take place in compliance with the guarantees provided by the GDPR.
privacyPolicy.s9Text: The Data Controller reserves the right to make changes to this policy at any time. Changes will be published on this page with an indication of the date of the last update.

cookiePolicy.s1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device while browsing a website. They serve to improve the browsing experience by remembering user preferences and collecting statistical information.
cookiePolicy.s2_1Text: They are essential for the website to function and cannot be disabled. They do not require user consent.
cookiePolicy.s2_2Text: They improve the website functionality by remembering user preferences (e.g., language, theme). They require consent.
cookiePolicy.s2_3Text: They collect anonymous statistical information about site usage to help us improve content and navigation. They require consent.
cookiePolicy.s2_4Text: Used to track visitors across websites in order to show relevant and engaging advertising. They require consent.
cookiePolicy.s3Text1: When you first access the site, an information banner is displayed that allows you to:
cookiePolicy.s3Text2: Non-technical cookies are preventively blocked until the user expresses consent, in compliance with applicable regulations.
cookiePolicy.s3Text3: You can change your preferences at any time by clicking the "Cookie Settings" link in the site footer.
cookiePolicy.s4Title: 4. How to Disable Cookies from the Browser
cookiePolicy.s4Intro: In addition to our banner settings, you can manage cookies directly from your browser settings:
cookiePolicy.s4Note: Note: disabling technical cookies may impair the functionality of the site.
cookiePolicy.s5Text: This site may use third-party services that install their own cookies. The Data Controller has no direct control over these cookies. For more information, please consult the respective privacy policies of the providers.
cookiePolicy.s6Intro: This Cookie Policy is drafted in compliance with:
s6Items: Italian Data Protection Authority provision of May 8, 2014
Italian Data Protection Authority guidelines of June 10, 2021
cookiePolicy.s7Text: For any questions regarding this Cookie Policy, contact the Data Controller at:
